_about: Golden Q&A set for the RAG layer. 'section' is the controlling citation expected among the answer's citations; null means the query is out-of-corpus and the system MUST refuse.

cases.q: what does a wine label need?
class and type designation for wine
appellation of origin on a wine label
government warning capital letters bold format
who must put the health warning on the container
what is the proof requirement for vodka
how do I bake sourdough bread
